steps.title: Apply the opposite effect
steps.content: Disruptions to an enjoyable experience increase reported enjoyment. The researchers suspect the opposite for an unpleasant experience, so interruptions during construction noise should make listeners judge that unpleasant experience more negatively than an uninterrupted version.

steps.title: Rule out unrelated predictions
steps.content: Choice A focuses on irritation with the breaks themselves, not the rating of the overall listening experience. Choice C concerns perceived duration, and choice D concerns perceived volume. The remaining choice compares interrupted listeners with uninterrupted listeners and predicts a more negative rating. The answer is B.
